text: I keep hearing about this ancient alien object that's speeding toward our sun, that some scientists say might be alien technology, so I emailed one of the world's most famous astrophysicists, and I learned that what's most interesting here is that while it's only the third object we've ever seen come from another star into our solar system, it's special because it's way bigger than the others, and it looks like it came from a much older part of our galaxy, which means it could be way older than anything in our solar system. And weirdly, it's got this very different chemical composition than what we're used to. So... aliens? There's no significant evidence of aliens, the object is clearly a comet, so if it's not aliens, why care? Because it's basically a message in a bottle from another star. And no, it won't hit us. But there are nearby asteroids that might, so to find out how we protect our planet, follow along.
